title: Claude Code vs Codex: Which Should You ACTUALLY Use?
summary: Austin Marchese compares Codex and Claude Code across five categories (user interface, technical output, design output, non-technical output, cost and speed) and provides guidance on tool selection. He argues that the Codex vs Claude Code framing is itself the wrong question to ask and emphasizes focusing on what actually matters for building quickly.
